title: 帝王賞の後に・ツギツ（ハ）ギ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Smart Falcon's victory in the Teio Sho, she's
steadily bringing to life her promised winning
streak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in the back of her mind, it still bothers her
that the hype has yet to reach the level of the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, student council president Symboli
Rudolf, the famed seven-crown champion, shows
up to acknowledge Smart Falcon's contributions
to dirt racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's next race is the JBC Classic, and
her determination is all the stronger after hearing
the president's expectations for her.
